title: Foil Windmills - Pack of 6 Assorted 19.5cm Windmills with Seven Foil Heads - Perfect for Summer Garden Activities
features: Pack of 6 large make your own windmills with 7 foil heads. Approx 19.5cm windmill with 7 assorted colour foil heads which are approx 7cm with a 31cm stick. Each windmill has 7 pins attached to hold the foil heads to the windmill. They detach easily from the windmill with twisting.
Assorted colours of the foils and sticks that are in a randomly mixed assortment to make 6 bright windmills.

Perfect for kids gifts, classroom rewards and at fete's or fairs, pots, planters, the garden or at the beach for sandcastles and can be used to keep birds or animals of the lawn or help protect a vegetable patch.
Make them with your children and then select where in the garden they will go or on the top of the sand castle at the beach.
SAFETY: All toys are covered by CE & General Product Safety Regulations. We cater to a variety of ages and we leave it to customers to assess whether a child is old enough for a particular item.
